payload.contentString:
Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73168
Patient: KHALID YAHYA ASEERY (MRN: 22416)
Visit Date: 2026-01-16 00:00:00
Diagnosis: V09.3-Pedestrian injured in unspecified traffic accident

PRIOR AUTHORIZATION (1 line(s)):
  Services were provided on an emergency/urgent basis where prior authorization
  could not be obtained in advance. Retroactive authorization is requested.
  Request: Grant retroactive authorization based on clinical urgency.
  - Seq 11: MOHAPD2649 - ROOM AND BOARD PACKAGE, HOSPITAL FACILITY, ADULT AND PEDIA ACCOMODATION SERVICE (SAR 2373.44)

ROOM & BOARD INCLUSION (1 line(s)):
  The services below are distinct from room and board charges and should
  be billed separately per the agreed contract terms.
  Request: Unbundle and approve as separate line items.
  - Seq 9: MOHS-B1105 - SUTURING LARGE WOUND UNDER G.A. (SAR 1558.06)

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (6 line(s), total difference: 0.06 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.
  - Seq 7: MOHS-AD123 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 6: MOHS-AD125 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 5: MOHS-AD128 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 4: MOHS-AD127 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 3: MOHS-AD129 Claimed=1756.45 Approved=1756.44 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 1: MOHS-AD124 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01

---
Total Claimed: 26353.44 SAR | Total Approved: 10417.54 SAR | Gap: 15935.9 SAR
Provider: Hayat National Hospital-ABHA
Policy Holder: MINISTRY OF HEALTH CASES
